title: Expert System for Wumpus World Problem-Solving
description: A flowchart depicting how an expert system uses its knowledge base and inference engine to navigate the Wumpus World, make decisions, and achieve its goal.
relationships: Percepts are fed into the Working Memory
Inference Engine matches percepts against Knowledge Base rules
Inference Engine updates Working Memory with new deductions
Inference Engine selects an Action based on rules and state
Action changes the environment, leading to new Percepts
